message.content:
I found a perfect 2-round characteristic. Now let me implement the attack using the "peel off last round" technique. The approach:
1. Use plaintext pair with ΔP = (0x80800000, 0x80800000) → deterministic 2-round characteristic predicting ΔR2 = 0x02000000
2. Brute-force 65536 seeds for K5
3. For each K5, undo last round and check if ΔR2 matches prediction
